title: The Unspecified Weather Relay Reward
originalityStatement: A negative-control copy of the original weather-relay premise that deliberately omits all Reward 2.0 manual bindings so the selector must not invent them.

storyModel.premise: A field engineer restores a storm-damaged weather relay and may revisit its region later, but the design has not established what persistent reward state or future functions the restoration creates.
storyModel.playerRole: Field engineer responsible for a regional weather relay
protectedCanon: The evacuation convoy departs only after the scheduled storm warning
Restoring the relay does not reveal the missing observer's fate

productProfile.spatialBudget: one regional map with one relay
